title: papaver argemone var. hybridum
intro: Papaver argemone var. hybridum, also known as the poppy or Argemone, is a plant species that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids like protopine and sanguinarine. The health benefits of Papaver argemone var. hybridum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds or leaves can be dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
